title: Monkfish Skewers with Ukrainian Twist
description: A flavorful and exotic dish featuring monkfish, traditionally marinated in a Ukrainian-inspired mixture, then grilled to perfection on skewers.
instructions: 1. Cut the monkfish into 1-inch pieces and place in a large bowl.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine lemongrass, garlic, black pepper, lime juice, and olive oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour the marinade over the monkfish and mix well to coat.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
6. Thread the marinated monkfish onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
7. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
8. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the fish is cooked through.
9. Serve hot with your favorite sides.
